definition: EM currencies should be segmented into three or four tiers based on their factor loadings rather than treated as a homogeneous asset class. Tier 0 tech-proxy currencies (TWD, KRW) exhibit R-squared ~0.5-0.7 against SOX/NASDAQ vs ~0.2-0.3 against VIX/EMBI. Treating KRW and TRY as the same asset class is increasingly indefensible.
evidence: Tier 0 extension confirmed as genuinely actionable in debates
open_questions: Do ILS and PLN truly belong in Tier 0?
Is the segmentation stable or will factor loadings shift?
How should portfolio construction change based on the tiering?
